questionHtml: Suggest a variable that needs to be kept constant in both groups of mice to ensure reliable results
markschemeHtml:
same species/age/ body mass of mice
OR
same muscle/ muscle size;

meta.title: Suggest a variable that needs to be kept constant in both groups of mice to ensure reliable results
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
